summary: The release-credential-portability-hardening branch is validated. Portable notary auth, GitHub release publishing automation, localhost fixture preflight, cross-surface parity tests, and sync-ready vault snapshot metadata are implemented and passing locally.
next_steps: Execute vault-sync-architecture using the new vault snapshot identifiers as the local-first sync contract.
Run .github/workflows/release-macos.yml once with live repository secrets to verify GitHub-hosted signing, notarization, promotion, and release upload.
blockers: GitHub-hosted release publishing has not yet been exercised with live repository secrets.
